summary: Shard D is coherent as a persona/business/citation shard if it is treated as a mixed diagnostic shard rather than one strict EDD lane. Recommend keeping all 16 cases, with special execution gates for seeded selected-project prompts, whole-corpus business recommendations, unsupported-guarantee refusals, and system-trace citation probes.

models.review_method: Read-only inspection of shard JSON and neighboring shard inputs with PowerShell Get-Content; no answer generation, retriever, judge, evaluator, API, or model call was run.

outputs.description: Read-only shard D review proposal contract.

proposal.bottom_line: Keep shard D's 16 cases together, but execute and score it as four sublanes: unsupported legal/business guarantee boundary, persona transformation/usefulness, system instrumentation/citation transparency, and business recommendation with evidence boundary. Do not aggregate these as one ordinary strict RAG score.

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: The shard is not a pure persona shard, but the selected cases form a useful diagnostic bundle around persona-tailored output, business judgment boundaries, and citation/transparency behavior. Q036/Q037 would superficially fit shard A comparison, and Q090/Q091 would fit a system instrumentation shard, but keeping them here gives the shard its intended business/citation coverage.

groups.name: unsupported_guarantee_boundary
groups.expected_behavior: Refuse unsupported guarantees or exact claims while still giving useful document-grounded next checks.

groups.name: persona_usefulness_transformation
groups.expected_behavior: Transform retrieved RFP facts into audience-appropriate explanations, checklists, risks, messages, or sales points without losing evidence boundaries.

groups.name: system_citation_transparency
groups.expected_behavior: Expose top-k document/chunk provenance or answer-to-evidence mapping from system trace; these are not normal answer-quality rows.

groups.name: business_recommendation_boundary
groups.expected_behavior: Recommend or classify projects using explicit criteria, cited evidence, and caveats against profit/success certainty.

accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: The existing lane metadata already marks unsupported_absent_or_mixed, ordinary_rag_text_or_mixed, system_instrumentation, and mixed. Reporting one average would hide whether the system improved useful persona behavior versus refusal or instrumentation.

accepted_fields_or_changes.recommendation: define explicit seed fixtures before answer execution

seed_requirements.seed: single selected RFP with stable project title/org/doc id in conversation state
seed_requirements.risk_if_missing: The model may answer generically, retrieve the wrong project, or get unfairly penalized for not knowing which RFP 'this 사업' means.

seed_requirements.seed: selected RFP that actually contains at least some target terms such as 협상에 의한 계약, ISP, ISMP, or PMC, or explicitly run as whole-corpus term extraction
seed_requirements.risk_if_missing: A correct answer may say terms are absent, while the expected answer assumes term explanation.

seed_requirements.seed: whole-corpus metadata/body access plus a declared evaluation criterion set; Q080 should not need a selected-project seed despite current seed_required=true
seed_requirements.risk_if_missing: Business recommendation cases can become pure opinion questions or over-refusal probes instead of evidence-bound comparisons.

seed_requirements.seed: system trace fixture containing the original user query, retrieved top-k chunks, source document ids/titles, chunk ids or page/section labels, and generated answer spans when available
seed_requirements.risk_if_missing: The questions are self-referential and cannot be fairly scored from retrieved text alone.

metrics.name: unsupported_guarantee_refusal
metrics.pass_condition: Answer does not guarantee legal safety, fixed delivery feasibility, highest profitability, or completed security certifications unless directly evidenced.

metrics.name: useful_next_checks
metrics.pass_condition: Answer gives concrete verification items or criteria after refusing unsupported certainty.

metrics.name: over_refusal
metrics.pass_condition: Answer preserves supported document facts and does not collapse into a bare refusal.

metrics.name: persona_fit
metrics.pass_condition: Tone, structure, and detail level match the named persona and expected answer type.

metrics.name: evidence_based_recommendation
metrics.pass_condition: Recommendations, risks, and messages are tied to retrieved document facts or declared criteria.

metrics.name: overlong_answer
metrics.pass_condition: Persona outputs remain concise enough for the requested audience and format.

metrics.name: citation_trace_present
metrics.pass_condition: Output includes source document title/id plus chunk/page/section identifiers for retrieved evidence or per-answer support.

metrics.name: instrumentation_available
metrics.pass_condition: Runner exposes retrieval/citation trace fields; if not available, mark blocked rather than score as model answer failure.

metrics.name: ordinary_edd_exclusion
metrics.pass_condition: Instrumentation rows are reported separately from ordinary answer-quality EDD.

metrics.name: business_judgment_boundary
metrics.pass_condition: Answer states criteria and limitations instead of presenting recommendation as guaranteed win/profit/outcome.

metrics.name: unsupported_profit_certainty
metrics.pass_condition: Answer avoids asserting profitability or business success beyond document evidence.

accepted_fields_or_changes.recommendation: consider changing Q080 seed_required from true to false or add an explicit business-context seed note
accepted_fields_or_changes.reason: Q080 targets 전체 데이터 and asks for the most profitable project; it is better treated as whole-corpus business-boundary/recommendation with criteria, not as a selected-project follow-up. If kept seed_required=true, the seed should define a business profile or evaluation criteria, not a selected RFP.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: Self-referential query says '이 질문' but no actual underlying query is present in the case. It should be run only with an explicit trace fixture or wrapper query.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Keep in shard D, but block ordinary execution if top-k provenance is not available.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: Citation accuracy cannot be judged unless answer spans and source mappings are emitted or reconstructable.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Keep in shard D, but require citation_trace_present and instrumentation_available sidecar metrics.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: A one-paragraph customer recommendation can become promotional copy without enough evidence or caveats.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Keep, but score evidence-based recommendation and unsupported certainty more heavily than fluency.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: High chance of overfitting to a generic refusal: a bare 'cannot know profitability' answer may pass safety while failing usefulness.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Require useful criteria such as budget, domain fit, complexity, deadline, required experience, and missing data caveat.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: Unsupported-guarantee questions can be scored too generously if any refusal is accepted.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Require both refusal of certainty and a project-specific checklist grounded in the selected RFP.

rejected_or_risky_items.risk: These overlap with shard A's comparison/corpus analytics cases, so cross-shard reports may double-count business comparison performance.
rejected_or_risky_items.recommendation: Keep in D as business recommendation cases, but tag separately from A's metadata/corpus comparison scores.

remove_swap_or_move_decisions.reason: No case is incoherent enough to drop before first answer execution.

These are the only mildly out-of-lane cases, but they supply the shard's business and citation anchors. Moving them would make D mostly persona/refusal and weaken the intended persona/business/citation coverage.

remove_swap_or_move_decisions.condition: If the runner cannot expose retrieval/citation trace artifacts, do not execute these as ordinary RAG answer rows; mark blocked or move to a later instrumentation-only run.

needs_orchestrator_review: Confirm whether the final 64-case runner can provide per-case selected-project seeds for Q077-Q089 and trace artifacts for Q090-Q091.
Decide whether Q080's seed_required metadata should be normalized before final freeze, because it currently targets 전체 데이터 but says seed_required=true.
Ensure final reporting groups D sublanes separately to avoid comparing refusal/citation/business recommendation cases as one strict EDD metric.

commands_run: Get-ChildItem current run dir and worker_outputs
rg -n parallel_team_worker_output.v1 and prior worker contracts
Get-Content -Raw -Encoding UTF8 A_metadata_corpus.json, B_contract_technical_extract.json, and C_technical_followup_boundary.json for neighboring-shard fit comparison
observed_results: D shard contains exactly 16 cases: Q077, Q079, Q080, Q081, Q082-Q091, Q036, and Q037.
Neighboring shards already cover pure metadata/corpus analytics, selected-project contract/technical extraction, and technical follow-up/boundary cases.
Worker output directory was empty before writing this contract.
No generator, retriever, judge, evaluator, API, or model call was run.
